{{Quote|Governor Koong Eeth has proven difficult. We aren't going to kill him when simply maiming him should accomplish our goal. Getting past his impressive security force and severely injuring him sends the appropriate message. No one denies the Zann Consortium. No one.|Urai Fen|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Koong Eeth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During a [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] [[Skirmish on Saleucami|mission]] to Saleucami, Eeth was grievously wounded by [[Urai Fen]] during a [[Skirmish on Saleucami|skirmish]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
